atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Defines CSS variables for your project based on a theme configuration.

atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Specifies additional files for Tailwind to scan.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Specifies a configuration file for Tailwind.
